title: Smoky Ukrainian Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Ukraine, made with smoky flavors and dense ingredients.

ingredients.name: smoky sausage
ingredients.notes: such as kielbasa or Ukrainian sausage

instructions: Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the sausage and set aside.
Add the onions and garlic to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the stew meat and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the carrots and potatoes to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add 2 cups of beef broth to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 hour.
Return the sausage to the pot and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
